title: that unofficial image song by Ogata Its out
display_title: that unofficial image song by Ogata Its out
wikitext:
[]: that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Apr 24, 2021 8:17 pm See here . Moonspeak Lyrics  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: [Translation Requested] that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by 惣流・アスカ・ラングレー » Tue Apr 27, 2021 1:37 am hi! if its the song “repeat”, i’ve translated it to english! i thought i had lost everything and just stood there i didn’t even notice the changing of the seasons that day you were certainly in my arms once more, i hope time would turn back your uniform that blows with the wind shows your pure white arms your false smile was all showing your quietly moving eyes, your slightly opened lips at that moment, what did you want to say? i’m still always thinking about it the tears that flowed through the dry red expanse unknowingly pull out new shoots and weeping, weak lives never again to bear the meaning of the retribution that hurt you that day, those days became the food of my spirit the tearing wind galloped just like dancing red flames amazingly you were so dazzling tightly closed eyes hid your sorrow i clearly didn’t notice it all at that time it was as if it was me who was searching for your smile in a fickle landscape let’s try again with emotions humans should have chasing that one step ahead of mine, it was you who grew up long ago even if i know, if i’m still weak and hopeless a sly and smart child would never catch up to you i’ll still try with my own strength till the day and moment we meet again if you’re ever afraid, think of these and go forth back to that day and start again, towards the future

[]: Re: that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Apr 27, 2021 7:39 am That's a bunch! My hero! Pretty touching actually. The last bit reminds me both at the "I'll probably wonder all this all over again" like from EoE, and the "If I ever doubt, didn't you and I have a connection" one from the Manga. For comparison, deepL gave me this: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Apr 27, 2021 5:44 pm ^ I've struggled to understand if Shinji is talking about Rei or Asuka, but your take that he's talking to both of them makes much more sense. The lines " i thought i had lost everything and just stood there i didn’t even notice the changing of the seasons" [...] "the tears that flowed through the dry red expanse unknowingly pull out new shoots and weeping, weak lives"

[]: Re: that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by Konja7 » Tue Apr 27, 2021 6:09 pm ElMariachi wrote: Here he's obviously talking about Rei. His line emphasizing how he misses her means that it's still before the final battle.

[]: Re: that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Tue Apr 27, 2021 6:14 pm once more, i hope time would turn back

[]: Re: that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Apr 27, 2021 6:26 pm Konja7 wrote: It could also be Kaworu. He also has pure white arms.

[]: Re: that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Tue Apr 27, 2021 6:36 pm I'm reminded of this theory about Sakura Nagashi: thread/19261/Sakura-Nagashi-Theory-Rebuild-and-A-Missing-Character/ I think the Rei verse could be referencing Quantum Rei. Only she gets a moment where she's in her school uniform but doesn't say anything. Could also fit in her bookend role. The line about retribution seems it could be a reference to Asuka and Bardiel, too. Ogata also has a bunch of new interviews on her upcoming autobiography. Seems she's talking a bit about about her "Image song" too. https://kadobun.jp/trial/saisei/

[]: Re: that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Apr 27, 2021 9:20 pm ElMariachi wrote: Ogata seems to be an AsuShin shipper!

[]: Re: that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by bogusman » Tue Apr 27, 2021 11:28 pm Could be about anybody else. Could mean anything, but anyway the song is good

[]: Re: that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by Konja7 » Wed Apr 28, 2021 1:47 am ElMariachi wrote: Now that you mention it... the entire song could be about Kaworu, there's only the line about that person who grew up that would look out of place.

[]: Re: that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Apr 28, 2021 8:52 am Konja7 wrote: ElMariachi#921528 wrote: Well, in Shin, it is implied that Rei wasn't Shinji's love interest in Ha (which is still pretty surprising for me). .

[]: Re: that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by Konja7 » Wed Apr 28, 2021 12:41 pm Kendrix wrote: What, just because Asuka is hot, too?

[]: Re: that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by Huagh » Wed Apr 28, 2021 1:07 pm Ogata retweeted this tweet when she first released the song, so take it as you will. https://twitter.com/kaname_kawosinw/sta ... 38658?s=21

[]: Re: that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by ShikinamiBogard » Wed Apr 28, 2021 2:20 pm Konja7 wrote: ElMariachi#921525 wrote: Here he's obviously talking about Rei. His line emphasizing how he misses her means that it's still before the final battle.

[]: Re: that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Apr 28, 2021 2:23 pm Well, Kaworus big scene is pretty far towards the end, if it was written before the movie was 100% complete, he wouldn't have shown up very much yet...

[]: Re: that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by bogusman » Wed Apr 28, 2021 5:14 pm Konja7 wrote: Trust me, I was also surprised about that sudden revelation that Shinji has romantic feelings for Asuka. I don't see enough interactions between them either. However, the confession seems to imply that Shinji has feeling for Asuka since Ha. Also, I suspect they want to nullify the possibility of romantic feelings towards Rei, since she is Shinji's mother clone.

[]: Re: that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Wed Apr 28, 2021 7:26 pm bogusman wrote: Somehow i think that Shinji's confession at the beach was made to suppress the backlash from shippers due to their plan of finishing Asuka's role and of the ending epilogue with Mari, regardless of whether that ending implied as a romantic or non romantic connection.

[]: Re: that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by bogusman » Wed Apr 28, 2021 8:46 pm C.T.1290 wrote: bogusman#921610 wrote: Somehow i think that Shinji's confession at the beach was made to suppress the backlash from shippers due to their plan of finishing Asuka's role and of the ending epilogue with Mari, regardless of whether that ending implied as a romantic or non romantic connection.

[]: Re: that "unofficial image song" by Ogata... It's out             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Apr 29, 2021 4:18 am Konja7 wrote: Kendrix#921568 wrote: What, just because Asuka is hot, too?
